HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

14// Only define these once during compiling
15#ifndef GLOBALS_H
16#define GLOBALS_H

23// -----------------------------
24// Types
25// -----------------------------
27typedef std::complex<double> dcmplx;
29typedef unsigned int uint;
31typedef blitz::TinyVector<double, 3> rvec;
33typedef blitz::TinyVector<dcmplx, 3> cvec;
35typedef blitz::TinyVector<cvec, 3> cdyad;
36
37// -----------------------------
38// Physical constants (SI)
39// -----------------------------
41extern const double PI;
43extern const dcmplx I;
45extern const double CVAC;
47extern const double EPS0;
49extern const double MU0;
51extern const double Z0;
52
53// -----------------------------
54// Geometric tags
55// -----------------------------
57#define FRONT 0
59#define BACK 1
60
